               value="Nested sections are primarily used to help human readers navigate to particular portions of the document."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Composition.section.section"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <contentReference
                        value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Composition#Composition.section"/>
      <condition value="cmp-1"/>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ele-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="All FHIR elements must have a @value or children"/>
        <expression
                    value="hasValue() or (children().count() &gt; id.count())"/>
        <xpath value="@value|f:*|h:div"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"/>
      </constraint>
      <isModifier value="false"/>
      <isSummary value="false"/>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map
             value="./outboundRelationship[typeCode=&quot;COMP&quot; and isNormalActRelationship()]/target[moodCode=&quot;EVN&quot; and classCode=&quot;DOCSECT&quot; and isNormalAct]"/>
      </mapping>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="cda"/>
        <map value=".component.section"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>
  </snapshot>
  <differential>
    <element id="Composition">
      <path value="Composition"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.identifier">
      <path value="Composition.identifier"/>
      <short value="eRecord.01 - PCR Record Number"/>
      <comment
               value="NEMSIS eRecord.01. Usage: Required/National. The unique identifier for this Patient Care Report. Must be globally unique."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.identifier.system">
      <path value="Composition.identifier.system"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.identifier.value">
      <path value="Composition.identifier.value"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.status">
      <path value="Composition.status"/>
      <patternCode value="final"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.type">
      <path value="Composition.type"/>
      <short value="PCR document type (LOINC 67796-3)"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system value="http://loinc.org"/>
          <code value="67796-3"/>
          <display
                   value="EMS patient care report - version 3 Document NEMSIS"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.subject">
      <path value="Composition.subject"/>
      <short value="ePatient — the patient"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="Reference"/>
        <targetProfile
                       value="https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ems-patient"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.encounter">
      <path value="Composition.encounter"/>
      <short value="The EMS Encounter (eResponse)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code value="Reference"/>
        <targetProfile
                       value="https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ems-encounter"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.date">
      <path value="Composition.date"/>
      <short value="PCR creation date/time"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.author">
      <path value="Composition.author"/>
      <short value="Crew member(s) who authored the PCR (eCrew)"/>
      <type>
        <code value="Reference"/>
        <targetProfile
                       value="https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ems-practitioner"/>
        <targetProfile
                       value="https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ems-organization"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.title">
      <path value="Composition.title"/>
      <patternString value="EMS Patient Care Report"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="pattern"/>
          <path value="code"/>
        </discriminator>
        <description
                     value="PCR sections corresponding to NEMSIS dataset sections"/>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <min value="6"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eResponse">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="eResponse"/>
      <short value="NEMSIS eResponse section — response type, unit, times"/>
      <comment
               value="Contains references to the EMSEncounter (eResponse) resource and related response data."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eResponse.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="EMS Response"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eResponse.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system
                  value="https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/CodeSystem/cs-nemsis-codes"/>
          <code value="section-eResponse"/>
          <display value="EMS Response"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eTimes">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="eTimes"/>
      <short value="NEMSIS eTimes section — all 19 EMS timestamps"/>
      <comment
               value="Times data is carried primarily in the EMSTimes extension on EMSEncounter. This section references the Encounter."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eTimes.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="EMS Times"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eTimes.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system
                  value="https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/CodeSystem/cs-nemsis-codes"/>
          <code value="section-eTimes"/>
          <display value="EMS Times"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:ePatient">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="ePatient"/>
      <short value="NEMSIS ePatient section — patient demographics"/>
      <comment value="Contains references to EMSPatient resources."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:ePatient.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="Patient Demographics"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:ePatient.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system value="http://loinc.org"/>
          <code value="29762-2"/>
          <display value="Social history note"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eScene">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="eScene"/>
      <short
             value="NEMSIS eScene section — incident location, MCI, first unit on scene"/>
      <comment value="Contains references to EMSLocationScene resources."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eScene.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="Scene Information"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eScene.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system
                  value="https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/CodeSystem/cs-nemsis-codes"/>
          <code value="section-eScene"/>
          <display value="EMS Scene"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eSituation">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="eSituation"/>
      <short
             value="NEMSIS eSituation section — chief complaint, primary/secondary impressions"/>
      <comment
               value="Contains references to EMSCondition resources for chief complaint and impressions."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eSituation.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="Patient Situation"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eSituation.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system value="http://loinc.org"/>
          <code value="55110-1"/>
          <display value="Conclusions [Interpretation] Document"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eHistory">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="eHistory"/>
      <short
             value="NEMSIS eHistory section — medical/surgical history, medications, allergies"/>
      <comment
               value="Contains references to EMSCondition (medical history), EMSAllergyIntolerance, and NEMSIS barrier-to-care observations."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eHistory.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="Patient History"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eHistory.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system value="http://loinc.org"/>
          <code value="11348-0"/>
          <display value="History of Past illness note"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eVitals">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="eVitals"/>
      <short
             value="NEMSIS eVitals section — each VitalGroup becomes one entry per vital sign Observation"/>
      <comment
               value="Contains references to EMSObservationVitalSigns, EMSObservationBP, and EMSObservationGCS. Multiple VitalGroups → multiple entries (NDR-007)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eVitals.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="Vital Signs"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eVitals.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system value="http://loinc.org"/>
          <code value="8716-3"/>
          <display value="Vital signs note"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eExam">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="eExam"/>
      <short
             value="NEMSIS eExam section — body region physical examination findings"/>
      <comment value="Contains references to EMSObservationExam resources."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eExam.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="Physical Exam"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eExam.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system
                  value="https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/CodeSystem/cs-nemsis-codes"/>
          <code value="section-eExam"/>
          <display value="EMS Physical Exam"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eProcedures">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="eProcedures"/>
      <short value="NEMSIS eProcedures section — EMS procedures performed"/>
      <comment
               value="Contains references to EMSProcedure resources. Multiple ProcedureGroups → multiple entries."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eProcedures.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="Procedures Performed"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eProcedures.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system value="http://loinc.org"/>
          <code value="29554-3"/>
          <display value="Procedure Narrative"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eMedications">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="eMedications"/>
      <short value="NEMSIS eMedications section — medications administered"/>
      <comment
               value="Contains references to EMSMedicationAdministration resources."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eMedications.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="Medications Administered"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eMedications.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system value="http://loinc.org"/>
          <code value="29549-3"/>
          <display value="Medication administered Narrative"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eAirway">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="eAirway"/>
      <short
             value="NEMSIS eAirway section — airway device, confirmation methods"/>
      <comment
               value="eAirway elements map primarily to Procedure resources with airway-specific codes."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eAirway.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="Airway Management"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eAirway.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system
                  value="https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/CodeSystem/cs-nemsis-codes"/>
          <code value="section-eAirway"/>
          <display value="EMS Airway Management"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eArrest">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="eArrest"/>
      <short value="NEMSIS eArrest section — cardiac arrest data (NDR-009)"/>
      <comment
               value="Contains references to Condition (SNOMED 410429000) and cardiac arrest Observation resources per NDR-009."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eArrest.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="Cardiac Arrest"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eArrest.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system
                  value="https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/CodeSystem/cs-nemsis-codes"/>
          <code value="section-eArrest"/>
          <display value="EMS Cardiac Arrest"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eNarrative">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="eNarrative"/>
      <short
             value="NEMSIS eNarrative section — free-text clinical narrative"/>
      <comment
               value="NEMSIS eNarrative.01 - The free-text narrative of the EMS call. Carried as section.text."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eNarrative.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="PCR Narrative"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eNarrative.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system value="http://loinc.org"/>
          <code value="67781-5"/>
          <display value="Summarization of encounter note"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eDisposition">
      <path value="Composition.section"/>
      <sliceName value="eDisposition"/>
      <short
             value="NEMSIS eDisposition section — transport, destination, patient outcome"/>
      <comment
               value="References EMSEncounter.hospitalization and EMSLocationDestination."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eDisposition.title">
      <path value="Composition.section.title"/>
      <patternString value="Patient Disposition"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Composition.section:eDisposition.code">
      <path value="Composition.section.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCodeableConcept>
        <coding>
          <system value="http://loinc.org"/>
          <code value="18776-5"/>
          <display value="Plan of care note"/>
        </coding>
      </patternCodeableConcept>
    </element>
  </differential>
</StructureDefinition>
